work_experience_normalized.description: Implementing interfaces and data structures for a new Android app using Android Studio and Kotlin.
Working effectively under pressure, collaborating with a team to meet demanding productivity objectives. Received several awards for the Employee of the Month and Employee of the Quarter.
Assisted the company's IT Manager, resolving technical issues and maintaining servers, networks, and employees' computers. Familiarized myself with how an engineering consultancy is run.

hard_skills: Operating Systems: Windows, macOS, GNU/Linux, Android, iOS
Programming Languages: Java, Python3, C, C++, C#, Kotlin, JavaScript, Shell Scripting
Libraries and Frameworks: OpenGL, OpenCV, OpenAL, OpenMP, MPI, Keras, TensorFlow
Integrated Development Environments (IDEs): Visual Studio, Atom, NetBeans, Eclipse, Android Studio, Scene Builder, Mathematica, Octave
Version Control Systems: Git, GitHub, GitLab
Hardware and Software Implementation: Raspberry Pi, Arduino
soft_skills: Self-motivated to work efficiently and meet goals while encouraging the team
Love for new challenges that push me to learn new things

other_interests_normalized: New Technology: Like to know how new products and their technology work
